sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12017" key="a)peu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπεύω</orth>, <sense id="n12017.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scorch off,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀφεύω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
